summary: The user is seeking assistance in researching potential partners for their AI-powered software solutions in the healthcare industry, specifically focusing on medical imaging and diagnosis. They recently had a meeting with a client from Singapore and are now looking to establish connections with organizations like SingHealth and NUHS to explore partnership opportunities.
facts: The user is the [Your Title] of [Your Company], which provides AI-powered medical imaging software solutions. The user had a meeting with a client from Singapore at the Tech Expo and followed up via email on February 15, 2023. The user’s software solutions cater to the healthcare industry, focusing on medical imaging and diagnosis. The user is looking for partners who can integrate their software with existing infrastructure to improve patient outcomes and reduce costs. The user is attending the Healthcare Innovation Summit Asia 2023, scheduled for March 22-23, 2023. The user is interested in meeting with Associate Professor Tan Cher Heng, Head of the Department of Diagnostic Radiology at Singapore General Hospital, to discuss potential collaboration. The user suggested meeting times on March 20, 21, and 22, 2023, for the discussion.
